caption: A person's hands open a packaged sports trading card product on a red and black surface featuring the "JASPYS" logo and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". The packaging is black with green accents and the word "OBSIDIAN" printed prominently. As the person removes the product from its clear plastic wrapping, a man wearing a black jacket is visible in a small inset picture in the background, sitting in a room with shelves and equipment. The product packaging includes text referring to "JERSEY AUTOGRAPHS" and a barcode. The action progresses from the initial grip on the plastic wrap to the removal of the inner card box, with the camera focusing closely on the hands and the packaging throughout the process.
